zh.Alnwick, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克
zh.Saint-Lô, Manche, Lower Normandy, France: 法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉利o
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth於1156年9月20日出生在英國越可爾惠特比時，他的父親Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy36歲，母親Agnes de Percy22歲。他於1182年與Isabel de Brus在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1198年9月29日在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉利o享年42歲，埋葬在法國巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉利o。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth于1156年9月20日出生在英国越可爾惠特比时，他的父亲Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy36岁，母亲Agnes de Percy22岁。他于1182年与Isabel de Brus在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1198年9月29日在法国巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉利o享年42岁，埋葬在法国巴-諾門迪曼其沙吉利o。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth was born on 20 September 1156, in Whitby, Yorkshire, England, his father, Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy, was 36 and his mother, Agnes de Percy, was 22. He married Isabel de Brus in 1182, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 29 September 1198, in Saint-Lô, Manche, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 42, and was buried in Saint-Lô, Manche, Lower Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth est né le 20 septembre 1156, à Whitby, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Percy, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Brus en 1182, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 29 septembre 1198, à Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth am 20. September 1156 in Whitby, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy 36 und seine Mutter Agnes de Percy 22. Er hat 1182 in Yorkshire, England Isabel de Brus geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 29. September 1198 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth è nato il il 20 settembre 1156 nel Whitby, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Agnes de Percy, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Brus nel 1182, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 29 settembre 1198, nel Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.

ja.Whitby, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビー
ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworthが1156年9月20日にイギリスヨークシュアイアウィトビーで生まれた時，父Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percyは36歳，母Agnes de Percyは22歳であった。1182年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでIsabel de Brusと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1198年9月29日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-ルoで42歳で死去し，フランスバセ-ノーマンディマンチェサイント-ルoにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth(이)가 1156년 9월 20일 영국 요르크실르 휘트비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes de Percy(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1182년 영국 요르크실르에서 Isabel de Brus(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1198년 9월 29일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-o에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 배세-노먼디 먼체 세인트-o에 묻혔다.

mn.20 September 1156–29 September 1198: 1156 оны Есдүгээр сарын 20–1198 оны Есдүгээр сарын 29

pt.20 September 1156–29 September 1198: 20 de setembro de 1156–29 de setembro de 1198
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth nasceu em 20 de setembro de 1156, em Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Percy, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Brus em 1182, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 29 de setembro de 1198, em Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth родился 20 сентября 1156 г. в местности уитби, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Percy, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Brus в 1182 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 29 сентября 1198 г. в местности сеинт-лo, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-лo, манч, бассе-норманди, Франция.

es.20 September 1156–29 September 1198: 20 de septiembre de 1156–29 de septiembre de 1198
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de Percy I, Lord of Petworth nació el 20 de septiembre de 1156, en Whitby, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Joscelin de Louvain 4th Baron de Percy, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Agnes de Percy, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Isabel de Brus en 1182, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 29 de septiembre de 1198, en Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Lô, Manche, Basse-Normandie, Francia.
